subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Do Thou protect Thy loved ones who have sought to attain unto Thy presence and to behold Thy beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی فاحفظ احبائک الذین هم قصدوا لقائک و زیارت جمالک و لذا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence of; reunion with God, @prayer for pilgrims
